demo_timestamps.description: Demonstration of the smart backend and its ability to handle large data volumes via streaming parquet files.
Walkthrough of data exchange with Autodesk Forma and Power BI, including setting up dashboard refresh schedules.

client_mentions.name: EncircleTech
client_mentions.context: Co-founder and CEO of the company, Varun, is presenting.

summary: The video discusses the transition from a thick client architecture to a scalable backend architecture to address customer needs for processing large data volumes efficiently. It details the role of a smart backend in handling heavy data processing and streaming data in real-time, particularly through the use of parquet files. The presentation highlights the importance of keeping connectors thin and leveraging Autodesk's tools like APS and Power BI for scalable data workflows.
